title: Cool Hat
description: A simple mod which adds a very cool long hat.
body:
Add a very cool long black co... I mean a very cool hat.

The cool hat can be crafted by 5 of black wool in this order:

![5 of black wool give you 1 hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc897f633b3654ddfa8477dea4241ebff5f22448.png)

*Note: the texture of the hat in this picture is of an old closed beta*

The hat looks very cool in game:

![A very cool black hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3495abd934a2f9e17832494b1605a9778218de8d.png)

[![Support button](https://storage.ko-fi.com/cdn/brandasset/kofi_button_blue.png)](https://ko-fi.com/naviester)
